_comment: Merge these hooks into your project's .claude/settings.json (or ~/.claude/settings.json for global). Replace __PYTHON__ with your Python interpreter (an absolute path is most robust) and __HOOK_SCRIPT__ with the absolute path to hooks/agent_eval_hooks.py in your installed skill. The command `python3 <skill>/scripts/probe.py --install-hooks --dir <project>` fills these in for you automatically.
